headline: Uber’s Expedia-Powered Hotel Bookings Could Be A Game Changer For Uber Technologies (UBER)
summary: In late April 2026, Uber Technologies announced a suite of new features at its GO–GET event, including in-app hotel bookings powered by Expedia, expanded travel tools, AI-powered voice bookings, and global enhancements to its Uber One membership. By turning its app into a travel concierge that can book more than 700,000 hotels and link rides, stays, food, and shopping, Uber is pushing further toward an all-in-one platform for everyday and trip-related services. Next, we’ll examine how Uber’s...
